prompt: Table: employees(id, name, department_id, salary). Query: List names of employees with salary > 80000.
Table: products(id, name, price, stock). Query: Find all products priced under 50 dollars.
Table: customers(id, first_name, last_name, country). Query: Show names of customers from 'Japan'.
Table: orders(id, customer_id, total_amount). Query: Select all orders with amount exceeding 1000.
Table: students(id, name, age, major). Query: List names of students in 'Computer Science' major.
Table: books(id, title, author, year). Query: Find titles of books published after 2020.
Table: inventory(id, item_name, quantity). Query: Show items with zero quantity in stock.
Table: flights(id, origin, destination, duration). Query: List flights departing from 'New York' to 'London'.
Table: employees(id, name, department_id, salary). Query: Average salary per department_id.
Table: sales(id, product_id, amount, region). Query: Total sales amount by region.
Table: courses(id, name, credits). Table: enrollments(student_id, course_id). Query: Count of students enrolled in each course_id.
Table: weather(id, city, temp, date). Query: Max temperature recorded for each city.
Table: reviews(id, product_id, rating). Query: Average rating for each product_id with more than 5 reviews.
Table: transactions(id, user_id, amount). Query: Sum of transactions per user_id.
Table: logins(id, user_id, timestamp). Query: Number of logins per day per user_id.
Table: tickets(id, status, priority). Query: Count of open tickets grouped by priority.
Table: users(id, name). Table: posts(id, user_id, title). Query: List usernames and their post titles.
Table: orders(id, user_id, total). Table: products(id, name, price). Table: order_items(order_id, product_id). Query: Find product names included in order ID 123.
Table: employees(id, name, dept_id). Table: departments(id, dept_name). Query: Show employee names and their respective department names.
Table: students(id, name). Table: exams(student_id, score, subject). Query: List student names who scored over 90 in 'Math'.
Table: authors(id, name). Table: books(id, author_id, title). Query: List all books along with their author names.
Table: suppliers(id, name). Table: parts(id, supplier_id, part_name). Query: Show supplier names that provide 'Engine' parts.
Table: matches(id, team_a_id, team_b_id). Table: teams(id, team_name). Query: Display team names for match ID 50.
Table: customers(id, name). Table: feedback(id, customer_id, comment). Query: List customer names and their feedback comments.
Table: doctors(id, name). Table: appointments(doc_id, patient_id). Query: Show doctor names and number of appointments they have.
Table: cities(id, name, country_id). Table: countries(id, country_name). Query: List city names and their country names.
Table: employees(id, name, salary). Query: Top 5 highest paid employees.
Table: products(id, name, stock). Query: List 10 items with lowest stock first.
Table: news(id, headline, date). Query: Most recent 5 news headlines.
Table: runners(id, name, time). Query: List runners by their fastest time (ascending).
Table: songs(id, title, play_count). Query: Top 20 most played songs.
Table: employees(id, name, salary). Query: Find employees who earn more than the average salary.
Table: products(id, name, price). Query: List products that are more expensive than any product in category 'A'.
Table: customers(id, name). Table: orders(id, customer_id). Query: Find customers who have never placed an order.
Table: departments(id, name). Query: Show departments that have no employees assigned to them.
Table: winners(id, name, year). Query: Find names that have won more than once in different years.
Table: logs(id, message, created_at). Query: List logs created in the last 24 hours.
Table: events(id, name, start_date). Query: Find all events happening in 'March 2024'.
Table: subscriptions(id, user_id, expire_date). Query: List users whose subscription expires tomorrow.
Table: reservations(id, room_id, checkin, checkout). Query: Find rooms booked for the period between '2024-01-01' and '2024-01-05'.
Table: posts(id, title, published_at). Query: Show posts published on weekends.
Table: tasks(id, name, status). Query: Set status to 'completed' for task ID 10.
Table: users(id, name, email). Query: Delete users who have not logged in for a year.
Table: products(id, price). Query: Increase all product prices by 10%.
Table: sessions(id, data). Query: Clear all data from the sessions table.
テーブル: 社員(ID, 名前, 給与). クエリ: 給与が50万以上の社員の名前をリストアップしてください。
テーブル: 商品(ID, 商品名, 価格). クエリ: 1000円以下の商品をすべて表示して。
テーブル: 注文(ID, 顧客ID, 金額). クエリ: 合計金額が1万円を超える注文を表示。
テーブル: 学生(ID, 名前, 学部). クエリ: '工学部'に所属する学生の人数を教えて。
テーブル: 支店(ID, 支店名, 地域). クエリ: '東京都'にある支店名をすべてリストして。
